metadata.title: Vision — Convex
metadata.description: Building open economies for all. The public, decentralised foundation for real-time exchange of data and value.

page.description: Centralised gatekeepers have dominated our economies for too long, extracting rents, inflating costs, and excluding billions from participation. Convex is the public, decentralised foundation for real-time exchange of data and value.

title: Data Lattice
desc: Global, replicated, self-healing, content-addressable data fabric

metadata.title: Data Lattice — Convex
metadata.description: A global, replicated, self-healing, content-addressable data fabric built on lattice technology and CRDTs.

page.description: A boundless, self-healing cloud of decentralised data and computing power. Fortified by cryptography and seamless consensus, no single entity controls it.

title: Lattice CRDTs
desc: Replicated, self-healing, off-chain application backends with lattice technology

metadata.title: Lattice CRDTs — Convex
metadata.description: Conflict-free Replicated Data Types that power self-healing, eventually consistent data across the Convex lattice.

page.description: Conflict-free Replicated Data Types form the mathematical foundation of the Convex lattice. Data converges automatically across peers with no coordination overhead.

title: CPoS
desc: Realtime convergent consensus algorithm for shared global state: faster than any blockchain

metadata.title: Convergent Proof of Stake — Convex
metadata.description: The world's fastest truly decentralised consensus algorithm. CPoS operates as a CRDT, not a blockchain, with sub-second finality.

page.description: The world's fastest truly decentralised consensus algorithm for a global state machine. CPoS operates as a CRDT, not a blockchain, solving the scalability trilemma.

title: Virtual Machine
desc: High performance execution for smart contracts and trusted assets

metadata.title: Convex Virtual Machine — Convex
metadata.description: A deterministic, Turing-complete virtual machine built on the lambda calculus for high-performance smart contract execution.

page.description: A deterministic runtime built on the lambda calculus. Turing-complete smart contracts, on-chain compilation, and the full power of functional programming.

docs.label: Architecture Concepts
docs.description: How the CVM fits the full stack

title: DLFS
desc: Distributed filesystems on the lattice: Dropbox meets BitTorrent meets IPFS

metadata.title: DLFS — Convex
metadata.description: Decentralised Lattice File System — distributed, content-addressable file storage built on the Convex lattice.

page.description: A distributed file system built on the lattice. Content-addressable, cryptographically verified, and infinitely scalable — like Dropbox meets BitTorrent meets IPFS.

title: CAD3 Data
desc: Revolutionary encoding format for self-replicated, cryptographically verified data

metadata.title: CAD3 Data — Convex
metadata.description: A universal encoding format for cryptographically verified, self-describing, content-addressable data structures.

page.description: A universal encoding format for cryptographically verified, self-describing data. Every value is content-addressable, every structure is self-replicating.

title: Convex Coin
desc: A utility token for global state transactions with fair economics

metadata.title: Convex Coin (CVM)
metadata.description: The native utility token powering the Convex decentralised execution engine. 1B max supply, fair release curve, zero read fees.

page.description: The native utility token powering the world's most efficient decentralised execution engine.

title: Digital Assets
desc: Create fungible tokens, NFTs, and complex financial instruments in a single expression

metadata.title: Digital Assets — Convex
metadata.description: Create fungible tokens, NFTs, and complex financial instruments in a single Convex Lisp expression.

page.description: Create fungible tokens, NFTs, and complex financial instruments in a single expression. The Convex asset model makes digital ownership simple, composable, and secure.

docs.label: CAD — Torus DEX
docs.description: Automated market maker for trading assets

title: Memory Accounting
desc: Global memory as a digital asset: incentives for efficient use and recycling

metadata.title: Memory Accounting — Convex
metadata.description: Global on-chain memory as a digital asset with built-in incentives for efficient use and recycling.

page.description: Global memory as a tradeable digital asset. Memory accounting creates natural economic incentives for efficient state usage and recycling — no artificial gas limits needed.

title: One Line DeFi
desc: Execute powerful, end-to-end economic transactions with one command

metadata.title: One Line DeFi — Convex
metadata.description: Execute powerful, end-to-end decentralised finance transactions with a single Convex Lisp expression via the Torus DEX.

page.description: Execute powerful, end-to-end economic transactions with a single command. The Torus automated market maker turns complex DeFi operations into one-liners.

docs.label: CAD — Fungible Tokens
docs.description: Fungible token interface used by Torus

title: CNS
desc: A global, content-addressable name service for decentralised applications

metadata.title: Convex Name Service — Convex
metadata.description: A global, hierarchical name service for actors, data, and services on the Convex network.

page.description: A global, hierarchical name service for actors, data, and services. CNS gives human-readable names to on-chain resources — like DNS for the decentralised world.

docs.label: CAD — Actors
docs.description: Smart contract model used with CNS

title: DIDs
desc: Decentralised identity for users, autonomous agents and digital assets

metadata.title: Decentralised Identifiers — Convex
metadata.description: W3C-compatible decentralised identifiers for users, autonomous agents, and digital assets on the Convex network.

page.description: W3C-compatible decentralised identity for users, autonomous agents, and digital assets. Self-sovereign identity with no central authority.

title: Convex Lisp
desc: Powerful, expressive functional programming with the lambda calculus: code is data

metadata.title: Convex Lisp — Convex
metadata.description: A powerful, expressive smart contract language based on the lambda calculus. Code is data, compilation is on-chain.

page.description: A powerful, expressive functional programming language based on the lambda calculus. Code is data, compilation happens on-chain, and the full power of Lisp is available to both humans and agents.

docs.label: Convex Lisp Tutorial
docs.description: Learn the language step by step

docs.label: CAD — CVM Execution
docs.description: How code executes on the CVM

title: Live Compiler
desc: Dynamic on-chain compilation with no external toolchains, no build pipelines: perfect for agentic systems

title: Agentic Economy
desc: All the power of the lattice with agentic tools using the Model Context Protocol

metadata.title: Agentic Economy — Convex
metadata.description: The open network where autonomous agents are first-class economic participants. Built-in MCP, programmable accounts, and a live Lisp compiler.

page.description: The open network where autonomous agents are first-class economic participants. Built-in MCP, programmable accounts, and a live Lisp compiler give agents the same rights, the same costs, and the same finality as humans.

metadata.title: Open Source — Convex
metadata.description: Convex is fully open-source. Inspect, audit, fork, and contribute to the decentralised lattice platform.

page.description: The entire Convex stack is open source. Inspect every line, audit every algorithm, fork and build your own. Transparency is not optional — it is foundational.

title: Non-Profit
desc: Governed by a non-profit foundation, built for public benefit in the age of AI

metadata.title: Non-Profit Foundation — Convex
metadata.description: Convex is governed by a non-profit foundation, built for public benefit — not venture capital returns.

page.description: Convex is governed by a non-profit foundation, built for public benefit in the age of AI. No VCs, no power brokers, no centralised control — just technology for the common good.
